name: Browser Activity
description: Where the user has been, what they downloaded, what extensions they have installed. Pulls Safari history + downloads + extensions, recent quarantine events, and KnowledgeC activity bundles to correlate active-app windows with URL visits. Metadata only — no page bodies.

plugins.role: Recently quarantined files cross-referenced with Safari download origin
Activity bundles from /private/var/db/CoreDuet/Knowledge — what apps were active when
